Benz.game_rule_p1_1: There are 12 betting areas in the entire game, including the four logos:
Benz.game_rule_p1_2: Each logo is in either of 3 colors, i.e. <font color=0xFF0000>red</font>, <font color=0x85FF00>green</font> or <font color=0xFEEF00>yellow</font>. Players may choose any one or several logos to bet on.
Benz.game_rule_p1_3: The game begins. The light will spin a few rounds and where it stops is the result of the game.
Benz.game_rule_p1_3_1: The payouts are according to the odds in the betting area.
Benz.game_rule_p1_5: You can clear the current bet.
Benz.game_rule_p1_6: You can undo the previous bet.
Benz.game_rule_p1_9: Maximum bet for a <font color=0x0cff00>single stake</font> in a single round is %0 %1
Benz.game_rule_p2_1: Getting the same car in three different colors is a win.
Benz.game_rule_p2_2: Getting four different cars in the same color is a win.
Benz.game_rule_p2_3: Five items clockwise from the game result, including winning item, are considered a win.
Benz.game_rule_p2_4: Fifth item before and after the game result are considered a win.
Benz.game_rule_p2_6: All logos  are considered a win.
